name: Aladdin
description:
__Height:__ 130 cm (Initial) - 167 cm

A mysterious young boy with a huge djinn within his flute. His name is based on 'Aladdin and the Magic Lamp'. He travels in search of metal vessels that contain other djinns. He has a pure and innocent, yet wise personality that dislikes fighting. Although he looks like a child, he has manly interests.

He is known as a 'magi', through mediating with his staff, he can gather the magoi of rukhs for attacks. He also has the ability to materialize the djinn Ugo that lies within his flute. In addition, he can also make the magical turban that is wrapped around his head fly. Because he was concealed in the 'Sacred Temple' (the place Aladdin calls 'a sturdy room'), he does not know much about his identity and the world.
